trail.val: >$140B; 80% of incremental WFE in adv foundry/logic + DRAM + adv-packaging

forward.note: KLA raised the CY26 WFE number every quarter this fiscal year.

trail.val: CY27 rotates to new-node leaders KLAC/ASML; KLA the call for positive revisions into 2027

forward.note: KLA the only large-cap to commit publicly that CY27 growth > CY26; UBS disputes process-control share holding into CY27.

trail.val: >20% growth; company-wide high-teen %; ~360bps share gain since 2021
high-teens total sales growth in 2026 vs LAM/AMAT 'more in the 20s'

forward.note: CY26 mix shifted to foundry/logic ~82% / memory ~18% on the sub-2nm node wave.
Differentiated growth leg on TSMC CoWoS where peers are under-indexed.

trail.val: DRAM-component costs a ~75-100bps GM headwind through CY26; +50-100bps tariff drag
FQ4 GM guided down sequentially to 61.75% +/-1pt despite strong revenue
still points to 62% full-year GM; KLA 'underestimated' memory-price impact on system GM

forward.note: Near-term margin capped by elevated DRAM component costs and slightly weaker systems mix.

trail.val: raised to 13-17% revenue CAGR; >90% of FCF returned; +150bps further WFE share
Redburn raises estimates +1-7% on revenue (2-8% above consensus EBIT FY27-30)

forward.note: Long-term model raised at Q3; Redburn says upside well reflected in expectations.
